title: SSC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 12256 Group B & Group C Posts
description: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has published the official notification for the recruitment of 12,256 Group B & Group C Jobs. Candidates who have qualified with any degree can grab this opportunity and apply for the SSC Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online on or before the last date of application. If you are looking fo...
